title: Expanded sidebar gear button missing aria-label/title
description: The gear button in the expanded sidebar footer (AppSidebar.tsx line 228) has no aria-label or title attribute, unlike the collapsed sidebar gear which has title='Settings'. Screen readers cannot identify the button's purpose.
suggestion: Add title='Settings' and aria-label='Open settings' to the gear button in the expanded sidebar footer.

title: Cmd+, keyboard shortcut for settings works correctly
description: Standard macOS convention Cmd+, (Ctrl+, on other platforms) opens the settings panel. This is implemented in useAppKeyboardShortcuts.ts.

title: Back/forward navigation buttons lack labels and appear non-functional
description: The CaretLeft and CaretRight buttons in the sidebar header have opacity-50 and no title or aria-label attributes. Their purpose (back/forward navigation) is unclear to users and screen readers.
